label: Strategy Artifact Inspect
description: Read or reference a filesystem artifact produced by the Earning Engine harness.

inputs.name: artifact-path
inputs.description: Path to a strategy harness artifact, review packet, screenshot, report, or comparison bundle.

outputs.name: artifact_ref
outputs.description: Typed evidence ref to the inspected artifact.

failureModes.description: The artifact path does not exist.
The artifact is stale, partial, or not produced by the current run under review.

evidencePolicy: Artifact refs must be tied to a task and decision.
Filesystem artifacts are evidence refs, not a replacement for role review.
Promotion claims require the relevant underlying artifact to be inspected, not merely listed.
notes: This descriptor covers artifact inspection when evidence is not yet linked to Trial DAG.
